name: Mawar Klasik
signature: A full rose blooms petal-by-petal via multi-stage SVG stroke+fill animation on the cover and each section divider; blush rose petals fall continuously across the page; couple photos sit inside an 18-leaf rose wreath frame; dew shimmer dots pulse on the cover rose; perfume bottle ornaments drift in the 3-layer parallax field; and a rose-gold foil shimmer sweeps the couple names.
brief: Timelessly romantic, rose-centric premium upgrade — deep rose and blush without going boho or pastel. Includes full standard section set (Susunan Acara, Dress Code, Hashtag, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
